title: Cisco India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Cisco India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
